actions: implemented webhook contract and sample event
rejected embedded credentials and dangerous command nodes
regenerated the external capability registry from current evidence
updated truthful UI status without enabling runtime execution

validation_results.command: python -m pytest tests/test_n8n_workflow_export.py tests/test_n8n_integration_decision.py tests/test_s_a_contract_inclusion.py tests/test_external_capability_registry.py tests/test_planned_adapter_boundaries.py tests/test_external_project_registry.py -q
python -m pytest tests/test_plan_sequence_lock.py tests/test_goal_drift_guard.py tests/test_test_governance_manifest.py tests/test_campaign_stage_gate_policy.py -q

python -m pytest tests/test_final_docs_truthfulness.py tests/test_final_bilingual_docs_parity.py tests/test_final_docs_structure.py tests/test_release_checklist_docs.py tests/test_readme_scope.py tests/test_version_alignment.py tests/test_version_matrix_docs.py tests/test_project_control_index.py tests/test_document_output_governance.py -q
flutter test test\widget_test.dart --plain-name "external capability assets preserve boundaries and current provider status" -r expanded
flutter test test\widget_test.dart --plain-name "n8n export status maps to UI page without runtime execution claims" -r expanded

pitfall_review.new_pitfall: The external capability generator lagged behind manually updated UI assets and could overwrite current integration truth.
pitfall_review.global_pitfall_log_reason: The current project AGENTS boundary prohibits editing Workspace global control documents without separate confirmation.
pitfall_review.prevention_rule: External project status must be generated from the source registry and generator tests must compare committed artifacts.

ui_test_adjustment.issue: A full Workbench widget render for status-only n8n evidence repeatedly timed out and left flutter_tester processes.
ui_test_adjustment.resolution: The n8n UI assertion now validates the same shipped UI registry asset and task page mapping deterministically without claiming runtime execution.

remaining_gap: User-owned n8n import smoke, UI/Core Bridge execution, later Section 5 items, Full Gate, EXE, and release remain incomplete.
